backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Luxyle app implementing feedback submission/management, appointment booking/management, blocked dates, user profiles, and admin login with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose, styling approach, and key functionality for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and destructive color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Luxyle React app with a root div and a module script pointing to src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with a Layout (Header/Footer/Toaster) wrapping routes for home (/), contact (/contact), and admin (/admin).
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Static About Us section displaying the brand story and three brand pillars (Curated Excellence, Timeless Design, Personal Touch) with luxury typography and gold divider ornaments.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays an access-restricted screen with a shield icon, message, and a link back to the home page for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginForm.t: Admin login form with username/password inputs (show/hide toggle), error display, and loading state; calls the useAdminLogin mutation and invokes an onSuccess callback on successful authentication.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentBooki: Appointment booking form with name, phone, email, message, date picker, and time slot selector; validates against blocked dates from the backend and shows a confirmation screen on successful submission.
frontend/src/components/CollectionGaller: Displays a responsive image gallery grid of luxury interior décor photos with hover overlays and a lightbox modal for full-size viewing.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackForm.tsx: Renders a review submission form with name, star rating, and text fields; submits feedback via a mutation hook and shows a success state on completion.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links (with smooth-scroll support), Instagram link, and a store address with Google Maps directions.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with scroll-aware styling, desktop nav links, smooth-scroll anchor handling, Instagram icon, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsSection.t: Displays a grid of hardcoded seed reviews plus dynamically loaded approved feedback from the backend, each rendered as a styled card with star ratings.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for all backend interactions including feedback CRUD, appointment booking/status updates, and date blocking/unblocking operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a luxury design system with CSS custom properties for gold, ivory, royal blue, and beige color palettes in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabbed UI for managing feedback (approve/reject) and appointments (status updates, date blocking), protected by an admin login form.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page displaying business location, hours, social links, an embedded Google Map, and a simple contact form with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Defines the main public-facing homepage for Luxyle, composing a hero section, featured preview, about, gallery, reviews, feedback form, and appointment booking sections into a single page layout.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with luxury-brand color tokens (gold, cream, ivory, royal-blue), custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost), box shadows, and plugin integrations for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for Luxyle Admin, recording a known login credential issue and a pending feature request (AR-1) to fix admin authentication to accept username 'Luxyle Indore' and password 'Luxyle1234'.
